description: The nike Flyclave Leather is a no-fuss sneaker with an ultra slim profile. It features a leather and suede upper, an extremely sleek EVA midsole and a rubber outsole, making it a great tennis shoe.Upper Leather and suede upper for durability and comfort Perforated upper in swoosh pattern on the side panels and on the upper side foot for maximum ventilation Symmetrical lacing system for snug Fit and protection from chaffing Cotton twill laces for comfort and durability Lightly padded tongue for enhanced comfort Reinforced suede overlay along toe guard to protect the forefoot Midsole cushioned footbed for comfort and impact protection Light EVA midsole for durability and shock absorption Outsole High quality rubber outsole for enhanced durability Herringbone pattern on outsole for maximum stability and traction Wash careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
